Triton Database — Schema Design

Schema design in Triton Database revolves around table definitions, column types, primary keys, foreign keys, and constraints. INT, BIGINT, DECIMAL, VARCHAR, TIMESTAMP, and BOOLEAN are the supported column types. Constraints include NOT NULL, UNIQUE, and CHECK. Foreign-key relationships between tables enforce referential integrity. Triton Database DDL statements include CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE, DROP TABLE, CREATE INDEX, and DROP INDEX. Triton Database column types and constraints are checked at INSERT time.
